quality.rationale: 明确输运方程+利用联络反对称性证明内积守恒+相对论运动学基础场景

origin.question: Problem 7.18. Show that the scalar product of two vectors is not altered as they are both Fermi-Walker transported along a curve $\mathcal{C}$ .
origin.solution: Solution 7.18. Let the two vectors be $\\mathbf{x}$ and $\\mathbf{y}$ . Then the Fermi-Walker transport law reads\\n$$\\n\\begin{array}{l} \\nabla_{\\mathbf {u}} \\mathbf {x} = (\\mathbf {u} \\otimes \\mathbf {a} - \\mathbf {a} \\otimes \\mathbf {u}) \\cdot \\mathbf {x} \\\\ \\nabla_{\\mathbf {u}} \\mathbf {y} = (\\mathbf {u} \\otimes \\mathbf {a} - \\mathbf {a} \\otimes \\mathbf {u}) \\cdot \\mathbf {y}, \\\\ \\end{array}\\n$$\\nwhere $\\mathbf{u}$ is the tangent vector to the curve $\\mathcal{C}$ and $\\mathbf{a} = \\nabla_{\\mathbf{u}}\\mathbf{u}$ . Using the product rule we evaluate the change in the dot product along the curve:\\n$$\\n\\begin{array}{l} \\nabla_{\\mathbf {u}} (\\mathbf {x} \\cdot \\mathbf {y}) = (\\nabla_{\\mathbf {u}} \\mathbf {x}) \\cdot \\mathbf {y} + \\mathbf {x} \\cdot (\\nabla_{\\mathbf {u}} \\mathbf {y}) \\\\ = (\\mathbf {a} \\cdot \\mathbf {x}) (\\mathbf {u} \\cdot \\mathbf {y}) - (\\mathbf {a} \\cdot \\mathbf {y}) (\\mathbf {u} \\cdot \\mathbf {x}) + (\\mathbf {u} \\cdot \\mathbf {x}) (\\mathbf {a} \\cdot \\mathbf {y}) - (\\mathbf {a} \\cdot \\mathbf {x}) (\\mathbf {u} \\cdot \\mathbf {y}) = 0. \\\\ \\end{array}\\n$$\\nThe scalar product is unaltered.
